scripts.preinstall: node -e "const ua=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||''; const exec=process.env.npm_execpath||''; if(!ua.startsWith('pnpm/')&&!exec.includes('pnpm')){console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1)}"
scripts.deploy:firebase: corepack pnpm run build:lotto && firebase deploy --only hosting
scripts.build: corepack pnpm run typecheck && corepack pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm run typecheck:libs && corepack pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
